title: Nested quasiquote (level >= 2) collapses to ()
goal: Found by the P4 stress harness (2026-07-02, master 2692ca63). Any quasiquote nested inside another quasiquote evaluates to (): ``a -> () (R7RS: (quasiquote a)); `(a `(b ,(+ 1 1))) -> (a ()) (R7RS: (a (quasiquote (b (unquote (+ 1 1)))))). Single-level quasiquote, unquote and unquote-splicing are correct. JIT and AOT agree on the wrong value, so this is a shared frontend/codegen bug, not a path divergence.
acceptance: tests/stress/found/nested_quasiquote.esk prints OK nested-quasiquote under -r and AOT
campaign_payoff: Nested quasiquote is core R7RS surface (macro-writing patterns, SICP ch4 code generation).

verifications.evidence: nested_quasiquote.esk prints 'OK nested-quasiquote' under -r and AOT; ``a and `(a `(b ,(+ 1 1))) evaluate to correct nested (quasiquote ...) datums. Fixed by #117. Stress XPASS r+aot.
